basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow / Test Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Junior Research Fellow / Test Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website of BITS Pilani. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow / Test Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech in Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication/Microwave Engineering, Diploma in ECE/EEE
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: Essential: B.E/B.Tech + First class M.E/M.Tech in Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication or Microwave Engineering or allied disciplines. Desirable: Experience in CST/COMSOL/HFSS, PIC Simulation, Python. Test Engineer: Diploma or B.Tech in ECE/EEE. Desirable: Good English, hands-on electrical/electronic equipment, RF instruments like VNA, spectrum analyzer, Python.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow / Test Engineer posts at BITS Pilani is 03-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow position, essential qualifications include a B.E/B.Tech degree followed by a First class M.E/M.Tech in Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication or Microwave Engineering or allied disciplines. Experience in specific software is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow / Test Engineer posts ranges from Rs. 18000/- to Rs. 37000/- per month, along with an additional 24% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by BITS Pilani for the Junior Research Fellow and Test Engineer positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for BITS Pilani recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Junior Research Fellow and Test Engineer are offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for BITS Pilani recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for these posts.

faq.question: Q8. Where is BITS Pilani located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by BITS Pilani, with the positions located in Hyderabad, Telangana.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for the Test Engineer post?
faq.answer: For the Test Engineer role, desirable qualifications include good English proficiency, hands-on experience with electrical/electronic equipment, and familiarity with RF instruments like VNA and spectrum analyzers, as well as Python programming.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a Diploma apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a Diploma in ECE/EEE are eligible to apply for the Test Engineer position. A B.Tech degree in ECE/EEE is also accepted.
